title: Mors Turdo-Galli.
content:
Who killed Cock Robin?
	    I, says the sparrow;
	    With my bow and arrow,
	 I killed Cock Robin.


	    Quis Turdo-gallum necavit?
	     En, adsum qui feci,
	     Qui telum conjeci;
	     Jaculis et arcu
	     Passer interfeci.
meaning:
Jacob Bigelow's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Mors Turdo-Galli."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
